metadata.name: Meridian Platform Economy
metadata.description: Base platform economy manifest providing shared instruments, standard account types, and FX valuation rules for all tenants

sagas.name: tenant_usage_billing
sagas.script:
def execute(ctx):
    party_count = ctx.active_party_count
    rate = Decimal(ctx.seed_data.platform_pricing.active_party_rate_gbp)
    bill_amount = rate * party_count

    # Record usage: log active party count to metering account
    position_keeping.initiate_log(
        account_id=ctx.tenant_id + "_usage_metering",
        instrument_code="ACTIVE_PARTY",
        direction="DEBIT",
        amount=party_count,
    )

    # Post double-entry: DR receivable, CR revenue
    financial_accounting.post_entries(
        entries=[
            {
                "account_id": ctx.tenant_id + "_platform_receivable",
                "instrument_code": "GBP",
                "direction": "DEBIT",
                "amount": bill_amount,
                "description": "Tenant billing: " + str(party_count) + " active parties @ GBP " + str(rate) + "/mo",
            },
            {
                "account_id": "platform_revenue",
                "instrument_code": "GBP",
                "direction": "CREDIT",
                "amount": bill_amount,
                "description": "Platform revenue: tenant " + ctx.tenant_id,
            },
        ],
    )

    return {"billed_amount": str(bill_amount), "party_count": party_count, "rate": str(rate)}
